_cite.reason: URL-normalization 1c: strip trailing markdown-emphasis `*`/backtick glued to citation URLs in intelligence_item_sections.content_md (customer-checkable link + validate_item_provenance criterion-2 exact-compare). Operator ruling 2026-07-04. Same transform as the write-site fix.

prior.content_md:
| Date | Milestone | Status |
|---|---|---|
| March 2023 | ISO 14083:2023 published by ISO TC 207 | **In force as of March 2023** |
| 22 October 2023 | Regulation (EU) 2023/1805 (CountEmissions EU) entered into force | **In force as of 22 October 2023** |
| 22 December 2023 | Commission Delegated Regulation (EU) 2023/2772 (ESRS, including ESRS E1 Scope 3 requirements) published | **In force as of 22 December 2023** |
| Before 1 July 2025 | EU Commission to publish delegated acts specifying default emission factors and certificate formats under CountEmissions EU | **Pending — not published as of generation date** |
| 1 July 2025 | Regulation (EU) 2023/1805 applies — transport organisers on EU-touching routes must issue ISO 14083-aligned emission certificates | **Enforcement trigger** |
| CSRD reporting cycles (first reports FY2024, published 2025 for largest entities) | First CSRD reporters must disclose ESRS E1 Scope 3 Category 4 emissions — requires ISO 14083-compliant data from freight forwarders | **Ongoing; first large-entity cycle already in motion** |

*Source: Regulation (EU) 2023/1805, Official Journal, Article 10. https://eur-lex.europa.eu/legal-content/EN/TXT/?uri=CELEX%3A32023R1805*
*Source: Commission Delegated Regulation (EU) 2023/2772 (ESRS), Official Journal, 22 December 2023. https://eur-lex.europa.eu/legal-content/EN/TXT/?uri=OJ:L_202302772*

---
